readme:
# imgshrink

A command-line tool that batch-resizes and re-encodes images. Point it at a folder, give it a max width, and it writes optimized copies to an output dir. Supports JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Usage: `imgshrink ./photos --width 1200 --format webp --out ./dist`.

recent_commits.author: Priya
recent_commits.message: Stream directory reads to cut memory use
